sigWerErrors.reason: 'Çalışmalar' (good work) and 'şanslar' (good luck) are different well-wishing phrases, but they convey a similar positive sentiment. The meaning of the sentence changes slightly but not drastically.
Omitting 'gelsin' removes the second part of the phrase 'kolay gelsin,' which is a common Turkish expression. Its absence makes the sentence incomplete and changes the intended meaning.
